The First Step

AI Operating System
Blueprint Session

A 90-minute consulting engagement where we map your business, identify every AI opportunity, and design the architecture of your operating system. Not a sales call. A deliverable.

Apply to BookWhat you receive

$500 · Credited in full toward implementation · Reviewed within 48 hours

What This Is

This is not a discovery call. It is a consulting engagement.

Most agencies offer free calls. We don't. Because a free call is a sales conversation dressed up as strategy. You walk away with a pitch, not a plan.

The Blueprint is a paid consulting engagement with one deliverable: a complete, written strategy document that tells you exactly what your AI Operating System should look like, what to build first, what tools to use, what it will cost, and what the ROI looks like.

That document has value whether or not you proceed with implementation. If you do proceed, the $500 is credited in full toward your project. It is not a deposit. It is not a fee. It is consulting work that you keep.

The Deliverables

What you receive from the Blueprint.

Delivered within 5 business days of your session. Written. Actionable. Yours to keep.

01

Business Workflow Map

A documented map of every significant workflow in your business — lead flow, client onboarding, delivery, communication, knowledge management and team coordination. Your operations made visible.

02

AI Opportunity Assessment

Every process evaluated for AI potential. Where AI should act, where it should assist, where it should be absent. Prioritised by impact and effort, not by what is technically possible.

03

Automation Architecture

The design of your AI OS — how information flows, where decisions are made, how AI layers connect your existing tools into a coherent, functioning system. Not a list of tools. An architecture.

04

Technology Recommendations

Specific tool recommendations for your situation — CRM, automation platform, AI models, knowledge management, communication tools. Why each, how they integrate, what to avoid.

05

Implementation Roadmap

A phased implementation plan. What to build first, what to build second, what can wait. Why the order matters. Dependencies mapped. Timeline estimated.

06

ROI Opportunity Map

A quantified view of the return. Hours recovered. Decisions automated. Revenue per founder hour before and after. The financial case for your operating system, specific to your business.

07

Priority Matrix

Every AI opportunity ranked by impact, effort and urgency. A decision tool for where to start. Useful whether you implement with us or independently.

08

Investment Estimate

A scoped investment figure for your specific implementation if you choose to proceed. No surprises. No sliding scale. A number attached to a defined scope of work.

Who This Is For

The Blueprint is designed for one kind of business.

Founder-led. Revenue-generating. Operationally bottlenecked. Ready to change that.

Coaches with 1:1 practices or group programs
Consultants with established client bases
Agency owners managing delivery for clients
Founders with 1–15 person teams
Service businesses with repeatable delivery models
Creators monetizing knowledge or community
Business owners ready to invest in infrastructure
Pre-revenue businesses with no established process
Businesses seeking a sub-$3,500 solution

The 90 Minutes

How the session is structured.

We use every minute. Come prepared. Leave with clarity.

0–20 min

Business Mapping

We walk through your business from the ground up. Every process, every flow, every decision point. Where are you involved? Where are you the only person who can act? We document as we go.

20–45 min

AI Opportunity Identification

Every workflow examined through the lens of AI leverage. What can be fully automated? What should be AI-assisted? Where does human judgment remain irreplaceable? We map each decision.

45–70 min

Architecture Design

We sketch the architecture of your AI OS. Which tools connect. How information flows. Where the AI layer sits. What the system looks like when it's running.

70–90 min

Roadmap & Priority

What to build first, second, third. Why. Expected outcomes. Investment range. Questions answered. The session closes with a clear decision framework for your next step.

The Investment

$500 for a consulting session with a written deliverable.

Most businesses spend weeks — and tens of thousands of dollars — building AI tools that don't connect or deliver results. The Blueprint costs $500 and gives you a complete, written architecture for your AI OS before a single tool is built.

The full $500 is credited toward implementation

If you proceed with implementation within 30 days, the Blueprint fee is credited in full. No partial credit. No conditions. 100% applied.

The Blueprint is yours regardless

The written Blueprint document, roadmap, and all recommendations belong to you. Implement with us, implement independently, or file it for later. No obligation.

Not everyone is accepted

Applications are reviewed first. If the Blueprint is not the right fit for where your business is, we tell you clearly and point you toward better options. This protects your $500 and your time.
